rulings.Case Title: HEUNG TING LIM VS. CYNTHIA LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 23, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA LEE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer on uncertainty grounds is overruled, complaint is not uncertain. CCP 1013 is not applicable to notices. Highland Plastics v. Enders (1980) 109 Cal.App.3d Supp. 1 and Walters v. Meyers (1990) 226 Cal.App.3d Supp. 15. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Heung Ting Lim, as trustee to verify the complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HEUNG TING LIM VS. CYNTHIA LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 23, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA LEE MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted with leave to amend for Heung Ting Lim, as trustee to verify the complaint. Motion is otherwise DENIED. = (501/REQ)
